metadata.title: PostgreSQL Event Store Setup with Flyway

story.iWant: PostgreSQL configured as the Axon event store using JdbcEventStorageEngine
story.soThat: events are persisted durably in PostgreSQL

tasks.task: Add Axon JDBC, Flyway, PostgreSQL driver to dependencies
Run migration on Docker Compose PostgreSQL
Verify tables created: psql -h localhost -U eaf_user -d eaf -c "\dt"
Commit: "Add PostgreSQL event store with Flyway migrations"

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: framework/persistence module created with Axon JDBC and Flyway dependencies
Flyway migration V001__event_store_schema.sql creates Axon tables (domain_event_entry, snapshot_entry, saga tables)
DataSource configuration for PostgreSQL in application.yml
Integration test verifies events can be stored and retrieved
Testcontainers PostgreSQL used for integration tests
Migration executes successfully on docker-compose PostgreSQL
Event store tables visible in database

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.section: FR003: Event Store with Integrity and Performance
doc.snippet: The system shall provide PostgreSQL-based event store with partitioning, BRIN indexes, snapshots, jOOQ projections, automatic data integrity validation, performance monitoring with forecasting and early warnings, and hot migration capabilities for zero-downtime migration to alternative stores.

doc.title: Decision Architecture
doc.snippet: PostgreSQL 16.10 with mandatory optimizations. JdbcEventStorageEngine for event persistence. Monthly time-based partitioning on domain_event_entry. BRIN indexes for time-range queries. Snapshot strategy (every 100 events). HikariCP connection pooling with optimal settings.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: JdbcEventStorageEngine configuration. Flyway migrations for Axon tables (domain_event_entry, snapshot_entry, saga tables). Monthly time-based partitioning on domain_event_entry. BRIN indexes on timestamp and aggregate_identifier. Snapshot strategy (every 100 events) with Jackson serialization. Performance optimization for 100K+ events.

doc.title: Test Strategy
doc.snippet: Singleton pattern (start once per test class). @DynamicPropertySource for connection config. Real database queries. PostgreSQL Testcontainers for stateful dependencies (H2 explicitly forbidden).

doc.title: Coding Standards
doc.snippet: Migration naming: V{version}__{description}.sql. Location: src/main/resources/db/migration/. Validation: Checksum verification prevents tampering. Framework migrations: V001-V099. Product migrations: V100+. Never modify existing migrations after deployment.

module.name: framework/persistence
module.purpose: Event Store + Projections infrastructure - PostgreSQL, Flyway, jOOQ
module.dependencies: framework/core, framework/cqrs, axon-jdbc, flyway, postgresql, jooq

file.snippet: @Configuration class AxonConfiguration { @Bean fun commandGateway(commandBus: CommandBus): CommandGateway }

file.purpose: Base class for all domain events (from Epic 1.7)
file.snippet: abstract class DomainEvent(open val eventId: UUID, open val occurredAt: Instant)

dependency.name: axon-spring-boot-starter
dependency.usage: Axon Framework Spring Boot auto-configuration (includes axon-jdbc)

dependency.name: kotest-runner-junit5-jvm
dependency.usage: Primary testing framework for integration tests

constraints.constraint: NO wildcard imports - Every import must be explicit
NO generic exceptions - Always use specific exception types
Use Kotest ONLY - JUnit is explicitly forbidden
Version Catalog REQUIRED - All dependency versions in gradle/libs.versions.toml
Testcontainers PostgreSQL REQUIRED - H2 is explicitly forbidden for event store
Constitutional TDD - Write tests FIRST (Red-Green-Refactor cycle)
Flyway migrations immutable - Never modify existing migrations after deployment
Use Axon standard schema - domain_event_entry, snapshot_entry, saga tables
Use @Autowired field injection + init block for @SpringBootTest (NOT constructor injection)
Framework migrations: V001-V099, Product migrations: V100+

interface.name: JdbcEventStorageEngine
interface.signature: class JdbcEventStorageEngine { builder(): Builder { dataSource(DataSource): Builder, transactionManager(TransactionManager): Builder } }
interface.purpose: Axon Framework JDBC-based event storage implementation

interface.name: Flyway
interface.signature: interface Flyway { migrate(): Int, info(): MigrationInfoService }
interface.purpose: Database migration framework for schema versioning
interface.usage: Auto-configured by Spring Boot, migrations in src/main/resources/db/migration/

pattern.name: Event Store Configuration Bean Pattern
Flyway Migration Naming Pattern
pattern.code: -- Framework migrations: V001__event_store_schema.sql -- Product migrations: V100__widget_projections.sql -- Naming: V{version}__{description}.sql -- Location: src/main/resources/db/migration/

ideas.idea: Verify framework/persistence module structure exists with correct dependencies in build.gradle.kts
Verify axon-spring-boot-starter, flyway-core, postgresql dependencies in build file
Test that PostgresEventStoreConfiguration creates EventStorageEngine bean successfully
Test Flyway migration V001__event_store_schema.sql creates domain_event_entry table
Test Flyway migration creates snapshot_entry table
Test Flyway migration creates saga_entry and association_value_entry tables
Verify table schemas match Axon standard (columns: global_index, aggregate_identifier, sequence_number, etc.)
Test DataSource bean configured with PostgreSQL JDBC URL
Test DataSource connection is valid (can execute simple query)
Integration test: persist event via JdbcEventStorageEngine
Integration test: retrieve persisted event and verify payload
Integration test: verify event sequence numbers are correct
Test @DynamicPropertySource configures DataSource URL from Testcontainer
Manual verification: docker-compose up, Flyway migration executes
Manual verification: Check Flyway schema_history table for V001 entry
Manual verification: psql \dt shows domain_event_entry, snapshot_entry, saga tables
Manual verification: \d domain_event_entry shows correct columns
